import os, subprocess
path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\antigravity\seconde-exp'
result = subprocess.run(['findstr', '/s', '/i', '/m', 'page_id access_token', path + r'\*.*'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=20, cwd=path)

print('STDERR:', result.stderr[:500])
print('---')
for f in ['.env', '.env.local', 'config.json', 'settings.json', 'fb_config.json', 'facebook.json', 'credentials.json']:
    fp = os.path.join(path, f)
    if os.path.exists(fp):
